select.select: SELECT CASE WHEN SUM(t.WEIGHT) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE SUM(t.PROGRESS_PERCENT * t.WEIGHT) / SUM(t.WEIGHT) END AS TODAY_PROGRESS FROM TF_TASK t JOIN TF_TASK_ASSIGNEE ta ON t.ID = ta.TASK_ID WHERE ta.USER_ID = #{userId} AND TRUNC(t.START_DATE) = TRUNC(SYSDATE)
select.insert: INSERT INTO TF_REPORT( ID, PROJECT_ID, AUTHOR_USER_ID, PERIOD_TYPE, PERIOD_START, PERIOD_END, SUMMARY, CREATED_AT, ISSUE ) VALUES( SEQ_TF_REPORT_PK.nextval, #{projectId}, #{authorUserId}, #{periodType}, #{periodStart}, #{periodEnd}, #{summary}, SYSDATE, #{issue} )
select.update: UPDATE TF_REPORT SET PROJECT_ID = #{projectId}, AUTHOR_USER_ID = #{authorUserId}, PERIOD_TYPE = #{periodType}, PERIOD_START = #{periodStart}, PERIOD_END = #{periodEnd}, SUMMARY = #{summary}, CREATED_AT = #{createdAt} WHERE ID = #{id}
